title: ceanothus × roseus
intro: Ceanothus × roseus, also known as California lilac, is a hybrid plant species that combines the characteristics of the Ceanothus gloriosus and Ceanothus connexus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Ceanothus × roseus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Ceanothus × roseus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including colds and flu.
